title: Give the initial subscriber notifications on items without needing to be assigned to a field
excerpt: Currently, creating an item, but not assigning yourself to a field (automated or otherwise) marks the creator as a subscriber, but does not give them notifications when there are updates to the item. Once assigned to any…

posts.author: Michael_GL (Michael Charitou)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, creating an item, but not assigning yourself to a field (automated or otherwise) marks the creator as a subscriber, but does not give them notifications when there are updates to the item. Once assigned to any field, notifications are received, but not before. The creator/initial subscriber should be able to receive notifications without further input.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Michael,

I wanted to make sure I am understanding correctly -

To clarify, even if you toggle your notification preferences accordingly via your profile, you still don’t receive notifications on items you’re subscribed to?
